In  Australia,  TG  licensing  operates  without  a  centralized  national
system, varying significantly across states and territories. For instance,
Tasmania  mandates  specific  permits  for  guides  conducting  tours  in
national  parks,  emphasizing  conservation  of  natural  heritage.  While
